Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

PagBank (PagSeguro) REST API surface covering Orders, Charges, Public
Keys, Checkout, Recurring (plans / subscribers / subscriptions / coupons
/ invoices), and Connect / OAuth. All requests authenticate with a Bearer
access token over HTTPS; responses are JSON.

Base URLs:
  - Production: https://api.pagseguro.com
  - Sandbox:    https://sandbox.api.pagseguro.com


Contact Support:
 Name: PagBank Developers
